# Desire Look

> Bridal makeup studio & beauty salon based in Dhanbad, Jharkhand — serving brides and clients across Jharkhand and Bihar. HD & airbrush bridal makeup, party makeup, hair styling, skin & facials, mehndi and nails.

- Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand 826001, India (on-location service across Jharkhand & Bihar)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 92794 66630
- Email: desirelook.official@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_desire_look_official
- Hours: Mon–Sun, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

## Articles

- [How to Prepare for Your Bridal Makeup Day](https://desirelook.in/blog/how-to-prepare-for-bridal-makeup.html): A simple checklist to help you get camera-ready and stress-free before the big morning.
- [HD vs Airbrush Makeup: Which Is Right for You?](https://desirelook.in/blog/hd-vs-airbrush-makeup.html): The real difference between the two most-requested bridal finishes — and how to choose.
- [The 3-Month Pre-Bridal Skincare Timeline](https://desirelook.in/blog/pre-bridal-skincare-timeline.html): Glowing wedding-day skin starts months in advance. Here's exactly what to do, and when.
- [Choosing the Perfect Bridal Hairstyle](https://desirelook.in/blog/choosing-bridal-hairstyle.html): From sleek buns to romantic curls — how to pick a bridal hairstyle that suits you.
- [Bridal Mehndi Designs & Trends for 2026](https://desirelook.in/blog/bridal-mehndi-trends-2026.html): The mehndi styles brides are loving this season — from minimal to full bridal detail.
- [7 Makeup Tips to Make It Last All Day](https://desirelook.in/blog/makeup-tips-last-all-day.html): Professional tricks to keep your makeup fresh from morning rituals to the last dance.
